temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on two men sitting side-by-side in what appears to be an office. The man on the left, in the background, is dressed in a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with epaulets and a black tie. He has a serious, attentive expression as he looks slightly to his right. The man in the foreground, on the right, wears a light blue, short-sleeved shirt and a striped tie. He initially looks down with a somber expression. The background is a simple office wall with two framed pictures hanging on it. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. The camera remains static throughout the clip. The man in the foreground then lifts his head and turns his gaze to his left, his expression becoming more engaged and serious as if he is speaking. A man speaks in a calm and serious tone, his voice steady and clear. He begins with a single, affirmative word, "Sure," before continuing in what sounds like Mandarin Chinese, stating, "我叫CIB跟踪的" (Wǒ jiào CIB gēnzōng de). The background is quiet, with no music or other distracting sounds, placing all the focus on the man's dialogue. The shot is framed tightly on the two men, emphasizing their interaction and expressions.
